nasb.text: “Where has your beloved gone, O most beautiful among women? Where has your beloved turned, That we may seek him with you?”

esv.text: Where has your beloved gone, O most beautiful among women? Where has your beloved turned, that we may seek him with you?

cnv.text: 你這女子中極美麗的啊！ 你的良人到哪裡去了？ 你的良人轉到哪裡去了？ 讓我們與你去尋找他吧！

ccb.text: 绝色的佳人啊， 你的良人去了何处？ 你的良人转往何方？ 我们好帮你寻找他。
